sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 2:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 2:1
items.html: After the restriction, when the light of Ein Sof departed from all four phases, there still remains a record in each and every phase; a kind of the light of Ein Sof that was in it prior to the restriction. (Part Two, Chapter Two, Inner light, Item 80)
